description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a fenced plot featuring a lush green lawn and several mature trees, including a prominent palm and broadleaf tree. The structure itself has a modern, angular design with a mix of black and white exterior walls, large windows, and a flat roof. The front of the property includes a gated driveway with a parked car, bordered by tall hedges and decorative columns. The backyard is spacious and open, with a continuous balustrade fence enclosing the property. The house features multiple rooms visible through the windows, and the landscaping integrates both ornamental and functional greenery. The overall setting suggests a comfortable, contemporary urban home with ample outdoor space.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with black and white walls, large windows, a flat roof, and a gated driveway, surrounded by a green lawn and mature trees within a fenced plot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the bungalow from an angled side, highlighting the open lawn, the black and white exterior, and the prominent trees near the house.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the bungalow, featuring the gated driveway, parked car, and the main entrance flanked by tall hedges and palm trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the bungalow, emphasizing the expansive backyard, balustrade fencing, and the dense foliage on one side.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the back of the bungalow, with a clear view of the lawn, the rear facade, and the trees lining the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
